title: VulkanOptimized by ake
description: This modpack contains optimization mods. Also here is the "Vulkan" mod, which according to tests shows itself better than OptiFine and Sodium combined. This assembly is well suited for playing on mobile devices (via PojavLauncher).
body:
# About this modpack

This **modpack** contains optimization mods. Also here is the "_Vulkan_" mod, which according to tests shows itself better than OptiFine and Sodium combined.

This modpack is well suited for playing on **mobile** devices **(via PojavLauncher)**. Without this modpack, the game gives about 30-90 fps on an average PC (RTX 2060, AMD Ryzen 7 2700X). With this modpack, it comes out to 120-350 fps(32 chunks).

# Mods(there is only optimization mods)

**Vulkan**   
**This is a Minecraft mod that replaces Minecraft's OpenGL renderer with an optimized renderer that uses Vulkan API. This mod is suitable for comfortable playing Minecraft with weak hardware!** _(don't forget about PojavLauncher)_

**No lags when there are many players on the server** (VMP Mod)

**Chunk optimization** (C2ME mod)

**Reduce RAM consumption** (FerriteCore mod)

**Improve a number of systems** _(game physics, mob AI, block ticking, etc)(Lithium mod)_

**EntityCulling mod**(skips rendering things that are behind you)

**More Culling mod** -
Culling is when you don't render things that the player can't see, to improve performance

**Modern Fix**
It improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs.

# 

**In general, this modpack is very suitable for playing from a weak computer and even a phone! Play with pleasure right now!**
